notes: Added specs/design-rule-engine/theme-usage.md as the protocol for selecting and recording a profile/register before rendered web changes.
Linked theme-usage.md from website workflow, design-rule-engine skill, AGENTS.md, and relevant agent prompts.
Removed repo-specific theme baseline variables and custom type-* classes from src/app/globals.css.
Replaced TSX references to --tone-*, --space-*, --font-body, and type-* classes with semantic Tailwind/shadcn utilities or explicit local Tailwind classes.
Updated design-tokens.template.json so it no longer describes globals.css as the runtime token target.
open_issues: The rendered visual tone now follows the existing shadcn semantic variables rather than the old warm baseline. A separate profile application task can tune shadcn variables later if desired.
